channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2118] parallel-scale-nfsv3.sh compilebench: mdt_attr_get_complex(): ASSERTION( (ma->ma_need & MA_PFID) == 0 ) failed
item.description:
https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/78983fc0-11b3-11e2-9408-52540035b04c

13:30:09:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == parallel-scale-nfsv3 test compilebench: compilebench ============================================== 13:30:08 (1349728208)
13:30:10:Lustre: ctl-lustre-MDT0000: super-sequence allocation rc = 0 [0x0000000200000400-0x0000000240000400):0:mdt
13:30:10:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark .\/compilebench -D \/mnt\/lustre\/d0.compilebench -i 2         -r 2 --makej
13:30:22:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: ./compilebench -D /mnt/lustre/d0.compilebench -i 2 -r 2 --makej
13:31:03:LustreError: 7050:0:(mdt_handler.c:636:mdt_attr_get_complex()) ASSERTION( (ma->ma_need & MA_PFID) == 0 ) failed: 
13:31:03:LustreError: 7050:0:(mdt_handler.c:636:mdt_attr_get_complex()) LBUG
13:31:03:Pid: 7050, comm: mdt00_000
13:31:03:
13:31:03:Call Trace:

item.summary: parallel-scale-nfsv3.sh compilebench: mdt_attr_get_complex(): ASSERTION( (ma->ma_need & MA_PFID) == 0 ) failed

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment:
in SLES11 SP2 client

https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/d3570e30-2547-11e2-9e7c-52540035b04c
this is literally missed functionality. MDT should fetch XATTR_NAME_LINK and take the first record
